fields.name: bank_website
fields.description: The official website address of the bank, typically found in the header or contact information.

fields.name: bank_phone_number_1
fields.description: A contact phone number for the bank, often labeled as 'mLinia' or 'Phone'.

fields.name: bank_phone_number_2
fields.description: Another contact phone number for the bank, often labeled as 'mLinia' or 'Phone'.

fields.name: statement_period_start_date
fields.description: The start date of the period covered by the statement, usually found near the document title, labeled as 'od' or 'from' in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fields.name: statement_period_end_date
fields.description: The end date of the period covered by the statement, usually found near the document title, labeled as 'do' or 'to' in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fields.name: account_type
fields.description: The type or name of the account, labeled as 'Rodzaj rachunku' or 'Account Type'.

fields.name: account_currency
fields.description: The currency in which the account is denominated, labeled as 'Waluta' or 'Currency'.

fields.name: account_number
fields.description: The unique identifier for the account, labeled as 'Nr rachunku' or 'Account Number', typically a long numeric string.

fields.name: next_capitalization_date
fields.description: The date of the next interest capitalization, labeled as 'Data następnej kapitalizacji' in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fields.name: account_interest_rate
fields.description: The interest rate applied to the account, labeled as 'Oprocentowanie rachunku', typically a percentage value.

fields.name: credit_limit
fields.description: The credit limit associated with the account, labeled as 'Limit kredytu', including currency symbols.

fields.name: credit_interest_rate
fields.description: The interest rate applied to the credit, labeled as 'Oprocentowanie kredytu', typically a percentage value.

fields.name: credits_number_of_operations
fields.description: The total number of credit operations during the statement period, found under 'Podsumowanie obrotów na rachunku' and 'Liczba operacji' for 'Uznania'.

fields.name: credits_value_of_operations
fields.description: The total value of credit operations during the statement period, found under 'Podsumowanie obrotów na rachunku' and 'Wartość operacji' for 'Uznania', excluding currency symbols.

fields.name: debits_number_of_operations
fields.description: The total number of debit operations during the statement period, found under 'Podsumowanie obrotów na rachunku' and 'Liczba operacji' for 'Obciążenia'.

fields.name: debits_value_of_operations
fields.description: The total value of debit operations during the statement period, found under 'Podsumowanie obrotów na rachunku' and 'Wartość operacji' for 'Obciążenia', excluding currency symbols.

fields.name: total_number_of_operations
fields.description: The grand total number of all operations (credits and debits) during the statement period, found under 'Podsumowanie obrotów na rachunku' and 'Liczba operacji' for 'Łącznie'.

fields.name: total_value_of_operations
fields.description: The grand total value of all operations (credits and debits) during the statement period, found under 'Podsumowanie obrotów na rachunku' and 'Wartość operacji' for 'Łącznie', excluding currency symbols.

fields.name: opening_balance
fields.description: The balance of the account at the beginning of the statement period, labeled as 'Saldo początkowe', excluding currency symbols.

fields.name: closing_balance
fields.description: The balance of the account at the end of the statement period, labeled as 'Saldo końcowe', excluding currency symbols.

tables.name: Account Turnover Summary
tables.description: A summary table showing total credits, debits, and the net balance for the account.

columns.name: Category
columns.description: The type of account turnover summary, such as credits, debits, or total.

columns.name: Liczba operacji
columns.description: The total number of operations for the respective category (credits, debits, or total).

columns.name: Wartość operacji
columns.description: The total value of operations for the respective category (credits, debits, or total).

tables.name: Transaction Details
tables.description: A detailed list of all financial transactions, including posting date, operation date, description, amount, and balance after each operation.

columns.name: Data księgowania
columns.description: The date on which the transaction was officially recorded or posted to the account.

columns.name: Data operacji
columns.description: The actual date when the financial operation or transaction occurred.

columns.name: Opis operacji
columns.description: A detailed description of the financial transaction, including the type of operation (e.g., ZAKUP PRZY UŻYCIU KARTY - Card purchase, PRZELEW ZEWNĘTRZNY PRZYCHODZĄCY - Incoming external transfer), and often additional details like merchant names, transaction IDs, or payment descriptions.

columns.name: Kwota
columns.description: The amount of money involved in the transaction. This can be a positive value for credits/incomes or a negative value for debits/expenses.

columns.name: Saldo po operacji
columns.description: The account balance immediately after the completion of the specific transaction.
